description_long: This rifle features a distinctive combination of wood and metal components, with a reddish-brown wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip, contrasted by black metallic elements along the receiver and barrel. The rifle has a prominent, straight barrel with a front sight post and a simple muzzle device. The magazine is curved and appears to be detachable, matching the reddish wood finish of the stock and grip. The receiver is topped with a black rail, likely for mounting optics, and the rear sight is integrated into the rail system. The overall design is reminiscent of classic AK-pattern rifles, blending traditional wood aesthetics with modern tactical features.
description: A wood-and-metal rifle with a reddish wooden stock, curved magazine, and black metallic receiver and barrel, featuring classic and tactical design elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the reddish wooden stock, curved magazine, and black receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the barrel's alignment, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with subtle differences in the wood grain and magazine curvature.
description_view_3: Rear-on view focusing on the stock's end, the top rail, and the overall slimness of the rifle.
